name: Visual Style PPT
description_en: Build style-driven, image-only slide decks by extracting reusable visual styles and rendering every slide as a generated image, then assembling them into a PPTX.
description_zh: 提炼可复用的视觉风格,把每页渲染为生成图片再拼装成图片版 PPTX,做出风格驱动的纯图幻灯片。
long_en: Extracts, saves, and reapplies visual-style keywords from documents or references; the deliverable is full-slide images placed into an image-only deck.
long_zh: 从文档或参考图中提炼、保存并复用视觉风格关键词;最终产物是放入纯图幻灯片的整页图片。
sec_note_en: Requires access to the "Image 2" image model—every slide image is generated through it, and the skill will not run without it.
sec_note_zh: 需具备 "Image 2" 图像模型的访问权限——每页图片都由它生成,缺少则无法运行。
